overall.description: A smooth first-person walkthrough of a modern luxury cliffside house in GTA V, featuring curved terraces with glass railings, exterior stairs, palm trees, and panoramic ocean views. The camera moves from narrow walkways to open terraces overlooking the coastline.

natural rock formation with sparse vegetation forming the left boundary
transparent glass safety railing with metal posts along the cliff edge
light-colored tiled pathway with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow walkway between a red wooden wall on the right and a rocky cliff face on the left. The camera moves forward along white paved tiles with a glass railing visible along the drop-off edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved terrace walkway with glass railing overlooking mountains and ocean

events.description: walkway opens from narrow passage to curved terrace with panoramic mountain and ocean views

agents.ego_description: walking along curved terrace with glass railing, ocean coming into view

entered.detail: vast blue ocean visible in the distance beyond the mountains
distant urban area visible along the coastline
white stone staircase ascending to upper level

segments.scene_description: The path curves along the cliffside, opening up to reveal panoramic views of the ocean and distant coastline. The glass railing now runs along the left side as the walkway curves, with an exterior staircase becoming visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior staircase ascending to upper terrace

agents.ego_description: climbing exterior stairs to upper terrace level

entered.detail: open terrace area visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide exterior staircase flanked by glass railings, moving from the lower curved terrace up to the upper level of the house.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace with palm trees overlooking ocean

events.description: emerges onto upper terrace with palm trees and panoramic ocean view

contemporary house structure with large glass windows and wooden accents
sandy beach visible along the coastline below

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the upper terrace, the scene opens to a wide space with palm trees on the left and the modern house structure on the right. The view encompasses the ocean, distant beach, and coastline below.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered terrace walkway along modern house with glass walls

events.description: enters shaded area under building overhang

agents.ego_description: walking along covered terrace with glass walls, beach visible below

entered.detail: cantilevered roof providing shade over the walkway
floor-to-ceiling glass windows of the house interior
table and chairs arranged on the terrace

segments.scene_description: Moving under the building's overhang, the lighting becomes mixed with shadows. The walkway continues along the glass walls of the house, with outdoor dining furniture visible and expansive views of the beach below.

scene_state.functional_zone: open terrace with outdoor furniture and panoramic coastal views

events.description: moves from covered walkway to open terrace with outdoor dining area
camera pans right to show wide view of coastline and beach below

agents.ego_description: exploring open terrace area, panning to view the coastline and beach below

entered.detail: distinctive desert trees with spiky branches
wooden dining table with umbrella and seating

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto a wide terrace with outdoor dining furniture and Joshua trees. The camera pans to reveal sweeping views of the coastline, beach, and ocean before continuing along the terrace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined cliffside walkway that gradually opens into an expansive, luxury upper terrace overlooking the ocean. It begins in a narrow passage between a red wooden wall and a rocky cliff, moving along white paved tiles until the path curves to reveal panoramic views of the distant coastline. The camera then ascends a wide exterior staircase flanked by glass railings, transitioning from the lower terrace to an upper level where the space expands to include palm trees and the modern house structure. As the movement continues under the building's overhang, the lighting shifts into mixed shadows along glass walls and outdoor dining areas before finally emerging onto a wide open terrace. The scene concludes with a pan across Joshua trees and outdoor furniture, revealing sweeping vistas of the beach and ocean.
